title: Papyrus #0268: Greek-Egyptian Astrological Chart
description: A Greek papyrus from Hellenistic/Roman Egypt — astrological chart document.
introduction: A Greek papyrus from Hellenistic/Roman Egypt — astrological chart document.

translation.text: From the papyrus collections of Greco-Roman Egypt: a astrological chart document preserved in the dry sands. These papyri document daily life in ways no monumental inscription can.
